documentation.file_docstring: Format tool output content for display in the sidebar. Detects JSON and wraps it in a code block with formatting.
inline_comments: Try to detect and format JSON
Get a truncated preview of tool output text. Truncates to first N lines or first N characters, whichever is shorter.

functions.name: formatToolOutputForSidebar
functions.doc: Format tool output content for display in the sidebar.   Detects JSON and wraps it in a code block with formatting.

functions.name: getTruncatedPreview
functions.doc: Get a truncated preview of tool output text.   Truncates to first N lines or first N characters, whichever is shorter.
